spec.description: OD×PE×PN spec inventory with Bill-To resolved buyer intelligence. No transport panels — see Transport dashboard.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
    COALESCE((SELECT SUM(s.quantity*s.length_per_unit)
      FROM inventory_stock s
      JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
      JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
      WHERE s.stock_type='FULL_ROLL' AND s.status='IN_STOCK'
        AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'),0)
    +COALESCE((SELECT SUM(h.length_meters)
      FROM hdpe_cut_pieces h
      WHERE h.status='IN_STOCK' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL),0)
,0) AS "value"

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(s.quantity*s.length_per_unit),0),0) AS "value"
FROM inventory_stock s
JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE s.stock_type='FULL_ROLL' AND s.status='IN_STOCK'
  AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(length_meters),0),0) AS "value"
FROM hdpe_cut_pieces WHERE status='IN_STOCK' AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pv.parameters)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM inventory_stock s
JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE s.status='IN_STOCK' AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value" FROM batches b
JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE b.status='ACTIVE' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0),0) AS "value"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

panels.title: 🏭  Production — What Is Being Made & When

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', b.production_date) AS "time",
  CONCAT('OD',pv.parameters->>'OD',' PE',pv.parameters->>'PE',' PN',pv.parameters->>'PN') AS metric,
  SUM(b.initial_quantity) AS value
FROM batches b
JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.status!='REVERTED'
  AND $__timeFilter(b.production_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',b.production_date),
         pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Monthly Production by Pipe Spec (Stacked Meters)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CONCAT('OD',pv.parameters->>'OD',' PE',pv.parameters->>'PE',' PN',pv.parameters->>'PN') AS "name",
  ROUND(SUM(b.initial_quantity),0)::FLOAT AS "value"
FROM batches b
JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.status!='REVERTED'
GROUP BY pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT
  CONCAT('OD ',pv.parameters->>'OD','mm') AS "OD",
  ROUND(SUM(b.initial_quantity),0) AS "Meters Produced"
FROM batches b
JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.status!='REVERTED'
  AND $__timeFilter(b.production_date)
GROUP BY pv.parameters->>'OD'
ORDER BY SUM(b.initial_quantity) DESC

SELECT
  CONCAT('PE ',pv.parameters->>'PE') AS "PE Grade",
  ROUND(SUM(b.initial_quantity),0) AS "Meters Produced"
FROM batches b
JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.status!='REVERTED'
  AND $__timeFilter(b.production_date)
GROUP BY pv.parameters->>'PE'
ORDER BY SUM(b.initial_quantity) DESC

SELECT
  CONCAT('PN ',pv.parameters->>'PN') AS "PN Rating",
  ROUND(SUM(b.initial_quantity),0) AS "Meters Produced"
FROM batches b
JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.status!='REVERTED'
  AND $__timeFilter(b.production_date)
GROUP BY pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY SUM(b.initial_quantity) DESC

SELECT
  pv.parameters->>'OD'                           AS "OD (mm)",
  pv.parameters->>'PE'                           AS "PE",
  pv.parameters->>'PN'                           AS "PN",
  COUNT(DISTINCT b.id)                           AS "Batches",
  ROUND(SUM(b.initial_quantity),0)               AS "Total Produced (m)",
  ROUND(SUM(b.current_quantity),0)               AS "In Batches (m)",
  ROUND(SUM(b.initial_quantity-b.current_quantity),0) AS "Consumed (m)",
  ROUND(100.0*SUM(b.initial_quantity-b.current_quantity)
    /NULLIF(SUM(b.initial_quantity),0),1)        AS "Utilization %",
  COUNT(b.id) FILTER (WHERE b.status='ACTIVE')   AS "Active Batches",
  COUNT(b.id) FILTER (WHERE b.status='CONSUMED') AS "Fully Consumed"
FROM batches b
JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.status!='REVERTED'
GROUP BY pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY SUM(b.initial_quantity) DESC

panels.title: Production Detail — All Specs (Produced vs Consumed vs Active)
📦  Live Stock — What Is Available Right Now

targets.rawSql:
WITH fr AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn,
         SUM(s.quantity*s.length_per_unit) AS meters
  FROM inventory_stock s
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE s.stock_type='FULL_ROLL' AND s.status='IN_STOCK'
    AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
cp AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn, SUM(h.length_meters) AS meters
  FROM hdpe_cut_pieces h
  JOIN inventory_stock s ON h.stock_id=s.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE h.status='IN_STOCK' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
)
SELECT
  CONCAT('OD',COALESCE(fr.od,cp.od),' PE',COALESCE(fr.pe,cp.pe),' PN',COALESCE(fr.pn,cp.pn)) AS "Spec",
  ROUND(COALESCE(fr.meters,0),0) AS "Full Roll Meters",
  ROUND(COALESCE(cp.meters,0),0) AS "Cut Piece Meters"
FROM fr FULL OUTER JOIN cp ON fr.od=cp.od AND fr.pe=cp.pe AND fr.pn=cp.pn
ORDER BY (COALESCE(fr.meters,0)+COALESCE(cp.meters,0)) DESC

panels.title: Live Stock by Spec — Full Roll vs Cut Piece Meters

targets.rawSql:
WITH fr AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn, SUM(s.quantity*s.length_per_unit) AS meters
  FROM inventory_stock s
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE s.stock_type='FULL_ROLL' AND s.status='IN_STOCK'
    AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
cp AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn, SUM(h.length_meters) AS meters
  FROM hdpe_cut_pieces h
  JOIN inventory_stock s ON h.stock_id=s.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE h.status='IN_STOCK' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
)
SELECT
  CONCAT('OD',COALESCE(fr.od,cp.od),' PE',COALESCE(fr.pe,cp.pe),' PN',COALESCE(fr.pn,cp.pn)) AS "name",
  ROUND(COALESCE(fr.meters,0)+COALESCE(cp.meters,0),0)::FLOAT AS "value"
FROM fr FULL OUTER JOIN cp ON fr.od=cp.od AND fr.pe=cp.pe AND fr.pn=cp.pn
ORDER BY 2 DESC

WITH fr AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn,
         SUM(s.quantity) AS rolls, MAX(s.length_per_unit) AS roll_len,
         SUM(s.quantity*s.length_per_unit) AS fr_m
  FROM inventory_stock s
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE s.stock_type='FULL_ROLL' AND s.status='IN_STOCK'
    AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
cp AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn,
         COUNT(h.id) AS pieces, ROUND(SUM(h.length_meters),2) AS cp_m,
         ROUND(AVG(h.length_meters),2) AS avg_len
  FROM hdpe_cut_pieces h
  JOIN inventory_stock s ON h.stock_id=s.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE h.status='IN_STOCK' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(fr.od,cp.od) AS "OD (mm)",
  COALESCE(fr.pe,cp.pe) AS "PE",
  COALESCE(fr.pn,cp.pn) AS "PN",
  COALESCE(fr.rolls,0)  AS "Full Rolls",
  fr.roll_len           AS "m / Roll",
  ROUND(COALESCE(fr.fr_m,0),0) AS "Full Roll Meters",
  COALESCE(cp.pieces,0) AS "Cut Pieces",
  cp.avg_len            AS "Avg Piece (m)",
  COALESCE(cp.cp_m,0)   AS "Cut Piece Meters",
  ROUND(COALESCE(fr.fr_m,0)+COALESCE(cp.cp_m,0),0) AS "Total Meters"
FROM fr FULL OUTER JOIN cp ON fr.od=cp.od AND fr.pe=cp.pe AND fr.pn=cp.pn
ORDER BY (COALESCE(fr.fr_m,0)+COALESCE(cp.cp_m,0)) DESC

panels.title: Live Stock Detail — Per Spec with Full Roll & Cut Piece Breakdown
📉  Utilization — Consumption Over Time by Spec

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', d.dispatch_date) AS "time",
  CONCAT('OD',pv.parameters->>'OD',' PE',pv.parameters->>'PE',' PN',pv.parameters->>'PN') AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0) AS value
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',d.dispatch_date),
         pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  CONCAT('OD',pv.parameters->>'OD',' PE',pv.parameters->>'PE',' PN',pv.parameters->>'PN') AS "name",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0)::FLOAT AS "value"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT
  CONCAT('OD',pv.parameters->>'OD',' PE',pv.parameters->>'PE',' PN',pv.parameters->>'PN') AS "Spec",
  di.item_type AS "Dispatch Type",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0) AS "Meters"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN', di.item_type
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity*s.length_per_unit
               WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
               ELSE 0 END) DESC

panels.title: How Each Spec Leaves — Full Roll vs Cut Piece Meters

targets.rawSql:
WITH prod AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn,
         ROUND(SUM(b.initial_quantity),0) AS produced,
         ROUND(SUM(b.current_quantity),0) AS in_batches
  FROM batches b
  JOIN product_variants pv ON b.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND b.status!='REVERTED'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
disp AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn,
         ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0) AS dispatched_m,
         COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL
                             THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END) AS buyers
  FROM dispatch_items di
  JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
  JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
  LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
  WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
    AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED') AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
)
SELECT
  p.od AS "OD (mm)", p.pe AS "PE", p.pn AS "PN",
  p.produced                            AS "Produced (m)",
  COALESCE(d.dispatched_m,0)           AS "Dispatched (m)",
  p.produced-COALESCE(d.dispatched_m,0) AS "In Stock (m)",
  ROUND(100.0*COALESCE(d.dispatched_m,0)/NULLIF(p.produced,0),1) AS "Utilization %",
  COALESCE(d.buyers,0)                  AS "Unique Buyers"
FROM prod p
LEFT JOIN disp d ON p.od=d.od AND p.pe=d.pe AND p.pn=d.pn
ORDER BY p.produced DESC

panels.title: Spec Utilization — Produced vs Dispatched vs In Stock with Unique Buyers

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
WHERE c.name='SELF' AND d.bill_to_id IS NOT NULL
  AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
WHERE c.name!='SELF' AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL
    THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT bt.id)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "value"
FROM dispatches d JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
WHERE c.name='SELF' AND d.bill_to_id IS NULL
  AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)

WITH top8 AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END AS buyer
  FROM dispatch_items di
  JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
  JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
  LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
    AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED') AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY SUM(di.quantity) DESC LIMIT 8
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', d.dispatch_date) AS "time",
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END AS metric,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0) AS value
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END
      IN (SELECT buyer FROM top8)
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month',d.dispatch_date),
         CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top 8 Buyers — Monthly Meters (SELF → Bill-To Resolved)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END AS "name",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0)::FLOAT AS "value"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END
ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END AS "Buyer",
  c.name                           AS "On-Record Customer",
  COALESCE(bt.name,'—')            AS "Bill To",
  pv.parameters->>'OD'             AS "OD (mm)",
  pv.parameters->>'PE'             AS "PE",
  pv.parameters->>'PN'             AS "PN",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)             AS "Dispatches",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0)          AS "Meters",
  SUM(di.quantity)                 AS "Units"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END,
  c.name, bt.name,
  pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity*s.length_per_unit
               WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
               ELSE 0 END) DESC

panels.title: Buyer × Pipe Spec Matrix — Meters per OD/PE/PN per Buyer

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END AS "Buyer",
  COALESCE(bt.city,c.city,'—')     AS "City",
  COALESCE(bt.gstin,c.gstin,'—')   AS "GSTIN",
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)             AS "Total Dispatches",
  COUNT(DISTINCT pv.parameters)    AS "Distinct Specs Used",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0)          AS "Total Meters",
  MODE() WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY
    CONCAT('OD',pv.parameters->>'OD',' PE',pv.parameters->>'PE',' PN',pv.parameters->>'PN')
  )                                AS "Preferred Spec",
  TO_CHAR(MIN(d.dispatch_date),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "First Order",
  TO_CHAR(MAX(d.dispatch_date),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Last Order",
  ROUND(EXTRACT(DAY FROM MAX(d.dispatch_date)-MIN(d.dispatch_date))
    ::NUMERIC/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT d.id)-1,0),0) AS "Avg Days Between Orders"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED')
  AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END,
  COALESCE(bt.city,c.city,'—'), COALESCE(bt.gstin,c.gstin,'—')
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity*s.length_per_unit
               WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
               ELSE 0 END) DESC

panels.title: Buyer Summary — Lifetime Meters, Spec Preference, Frequency

targets.rawSql:
WITH top10 AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END AS buyer
  FROM dispatch_items di
  JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
  JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
  LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
    AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED') AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY SUM(di.quantity) DESC LIMIT 10
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END AS "Buyer",
  CONCAT('OD',pv.parameters->>'OD',' PE',pv.parameters->>'PE',' PN',pv.parameters->>'PN') AS "Spec",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE
    WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity * s.length_per_unit
    WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
    ELSE di.quantity * COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0)
END),0) AS "Meters"
FROM dispatch_items di
JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
JOIN customers c ON d.customer_id=c.id
LEFT JOIN bill_to bt ON d.bill_to_id=bt.id
JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
  AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED') AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  AND CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END
      IN (SELECT buyer FROM top10)
  AND $__timeFilter(d.dispatch_date)
GROUP BY
  CASE WHEN c.name='SELF' AND bt.name IS NOT NULL THEN bt.name ELSE c.name END,
  pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN'
ORDER BY SUM(di.quantity) DESC

panels.title: Top 10 Buyers — Spec Preference (Meters per Spec, Stacked)

targets.rawSql:
WITH dispatch_rate AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn,
         SUM(CASE WHEN di.item_type='FULL_ROLL' THEN di.quantity*s.length_per_unit
                  WHEN di.item_type IN ('CUT_ROLL','CUT_PIECE') THEN COALESCE(di.length_meters,0)
                  ELSE di.quantity*COALESCE(s.length_per_unit,0) END) / 30.0 AS daily_m
  FROM dispatch_items di
  JOIN dispatches d ON di.dispatch_id=d.id
  JOIN inventory_stock s ON di.stock_id=s.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON di.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.reverted_at IS NULL
    AND d.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','REVERTED') AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
    AND d.dispatch_date >= NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
stock_now AS (
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS od, pv.parameters->>'PE' AS pe,
         pv.parameters->>'PN' AS pn, SUM(s.quantity*s.length_per_unit) AS m
  FROM inventory_stock s
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE s.stock_type='FULL_ROLL' AND s.status='IN_STOCK'
    AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND pt.name='HDPE Pipe'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
  UNION ALL
  SELECT pv.parameters->>'OD', pv.parameters->>'PE', pv.parameters->>'PN',
         SUM(h.length_meters)
  FROM hdpe_cut_pieces h
  JOIN inventory_stock s ON h.stock_id=s.id
  JOIN product_variants pv ON s.product_variant_id=pv.id
  JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
  WHERE h.status='IN_STOCK' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL
  GROUP BY 1,2,3
),
total AS (SELECT od,pe,pn,SUM(m) AS total_m FROM stock_now GROUP BY 1,2,3)
SELECT
  CONCAT('OD',COALESCE(t.od,dr.od),' PE',COALESCE(t.pe,dr.pe),' PN',COALESCE(t.pn,dr.pn)) AS "Spec",
  COALESCE(t.od,dr.od) AS "OD", COALESCE(t.pe,dr.pe) AS "PE", COALESCE(t.pn,dr.pn) AS "PN",
  ROUND(COALESCE(t.total_m,0),0)   AS "Stock (m)",
  ROUND(COALESCE(dr.daily_m,0),1)  AS "Daily Usage (m/day)",
  CASE WHEN dr.daily_m>0 THEN ROUND(t.total_m/dr.daily_m,0) ELSE NULL END AS "Days Left",
  CASE
    WHEN dr.daily_m IS NULL OR dr.daily_m=0 THEN '⚪ No Recent Activity'
    WHEN t.total_m/dr.daily_m < 7   THEN '🔴 Critical  < 7 days'
    WHEN t.total_m/dr.daily_m < 30  THEN '🟠 Low       < 30 days'
    WHEN t.total_m/dr.daily_m < 60  THEN '🟡 Moderate  < 60 days'
    ELSE '🟢 Healthy'
  END AS "Status"
FROM total t
FULL OUTER JOIN dispatch_rate dr ON t.od=dr.od AND t.pe=dr.pe AND t.pn=dr.pn
WHERE COALESCE(t.total_m,0)>0 OR COALESCE(dr.daily_m,0)>0
ORDER BY CASE WHEN dr.daily_m>0 THEN t.total_m/dr.daily_m ELSE 9999 END ASC

panels.title: Days of Stock Remaining per Spec — Based on 30-Day Dispatch Rate

list.label: OD (mm)
list.name: od
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT pv.parameters->>'OD' AS __value
FROM product_variants pv JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND pv.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY 1

list.label: PE Grade
list.name: pe
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT pv.parameters->>'PE' AS __value
FROM product_variants pv JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND pv.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY 1

list.label: PN Rating
list.name: pn
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT pv.parameters->>'PN' AS __value
FROM product_variants pv JOIN product_types pt ON pv.product_type_id=pt.id
WHERE pt.name='HDPE Pipe' AND pv.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY 1

spec.title: Tarko — HDPE Pipe Inventory Intelligence v2
